name: promote --plan emits the working-to-official move plan without modifying any file
command: ID=P557P01; bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/acquire-technology-rules.sh" --technology Vue --project $ID --source-file g.txt --source-id sg557p01 --now 2026-07-05T00:00:00Z >/dev/null 2>&1; bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/promote-project-rule.sh" --project $ID --namespace vue --plan 2>pe.err >/dev/null; ok=no; grep -qE 'mode=plan moved=false' pe.err && [ -f "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/generated-code-quality-standards"/_project/$ID/vue/sg557p01.yaml ] && [ ! -f "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/generated-code-quality-standards"/vue/sg557p01.yaml ] && ok=yes; rm -rf "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/generated-code-quality-standards"/_project/$ID; [ "$ok" = yes ] && echo promote-plan-no-write 1>&2
setup: printf '%s\n' 'Always bind a unique key to every loop element.' 'Never combine conditional and loop on one element.' > g.txt
